# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |
| older   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please email the repository owner directly. Do not open a public issue.

## Secrets Policy

This repository uses `gitleaks` to prevent accidental secret commits. If you believe a secret has been exposed, revoke it immediately and notify the maintainers.
